LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-06-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LAGOS VISTOSO HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR $3,682 IN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Motion Of Lagos Vistoso Homeowners Association For Attorneys Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. B. AUSTIN BAILLIO, Esq. of Maxwell & Morgan, LLP (Tel: 480-833-1001) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LAGOS VISTOSO HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for $3,682 in attorney fees and costs is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
